182 F0400D_SNACK_BTWN_CD F0400D_SNACK_BTWN_CD F0400D Interview for Daily Preferences: Snack Between Meals Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they have a snack between meals while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very important
4=Not important at all
5=Important, but
